title: Pull-in apparatus, image forming apparatus, sheet accommodating apparatus, and draw-out unit
abstract: A pull-in apparatus configured to pull in a unit toward a predetermined position in an apparatus body includes an arm member, a restriction member, a first action portion and a second action portion. The restriction member is movable between a lock position at which the restriction member restricts movement of the arm member in a first direction and a lock-release position at which the restriction member allows the movement of the arm member in the first direction. Movement of the restriction member from the lock position toward the lock-release position is restricted in a state in which the arm member is at a stand-by position, and is allowed in a state in which the arm member has been moved from the stand-by position in a second direction.
claims: 1. An image forming apparatus comprising: an apparatus body including a rear side and a front side opposite to the rear side; a first cartridge including a first developing roller; a second cartridge including a second developing roller; a tray to which the first cartridge and the second cartridge are detachably attached, the tray including a first engaging portion configured to contact the first cartridge and a second engaging portion configured to contact the second cartridge, the tray being drawable from the apparatus body in a direction from the rear side to the front side; a first arm member configured to move the tray toward a predetermined position by moving in a first direction so that the tray is moved in a direction from the front side to the rear side; and a first spring configured to urge the first arm member in the first direction.
